content.question: Are there implementation details (e.g., targeted outreach, subsidized application costs, non-academic admission criteria, feeder school partnerships) that substantially mitigate SES-based selection into 6/8-year gimnázium without abolishing the track?
content.reduction_path: Map variation in access interventions across Hungarian schools/regions offering 6/8-year programs and measure whether schools with stronger equity outreach show reduced SES gradient in admission or improved downstream outcomes for admitted disadvantaged students
